data.title: Runes protocol will undergo an upgrade called “Agents” to support Runes AMM on Bitcoin L1
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Ordinals founder Casey announced an upgrade to the Runes protocol, called "Agents", to implement the Runes AMM on Bitcoin L1.
Agents enable market makers to add liquidity to the Runes AMM trustlessly through the "interactive transaction construction" mechanism, and solve trading problems such as "batch splitting" and "memory pool preemption" to improve user experience. At present, the specific launch date of this function has not yet been announced.

data.title: XRP ETF Anticipated by End of 2025, Says Ripple CEO
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has indicated that an XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) is expected to be launched by the end of 2025. He noted that over a dozen applications from companies like Bitwise and Franklin Templeton are currently awaiting approval from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Garlinghouse also mentioned the potential for Ripple Labs to go public, although he emphasized that it is not an immediate priority.

data.title: AI Research Collaboration Between 0G Labs and Microsoft Accepted at FSE 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the collaboration between 0G Labs, led by CTO Ming Wu, and Microsoft Research has resulted in a significant achievement in artificial intelligence research. Their joint paper has been accepted in the 'Ideas, Visions, and Reflections' section of the FSE 2025 conference, a prestigious event in the field of software engineering.

The paper introduces an innovative concept that extends optimization methods similar to FlashAttention into a distributed map-reduce framework, aiming to automate these processes. The final version of the paper will be publicly released soon.

FSE 2025, known as the Foundations of Software Engineering conference, is recognized as one of the leading academic conferences in software engineering. Acceptance in the 'Ideas, Visions, and Reflections' section indicates that the paper focuses on forward-thinking concepts and innovative approaches rather than traditional experimental research.

This work is expected to have a significant impact on future AI model training and software engineering practices, particularly in scenarios involving large-scale data processing. The automation of optimization processes can substantially reduce development costs and time.

data.title: RedStone clarifies: Not working with Web3Port or Whisper
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Decentralized oracle project RedStone issued a statement to clarify that it has not cooperated with Web3Port or market maker Whisper, and the relevant cooperation statements that have been circulated before have not been officially approved.
RedStone immediately requested the removal of such information after discovering it, but there may still be some traces of being indexed. RedStone emphasized that the above-mentioned entities have never provided market making services for it, and such misleading statements may cause serious impact and actual damage.
RedStone said that the team is committed to maintaining industry integrity and will continue to strengthen the transparency of communication with the community and ecosystem.

data.title: AscendEX will list KIKICat (KIKI)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch KIKICat (KIKI) at 20:00 on March 20, open KIKI/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.

data.title: User Loses $304,000 Due to Mistaken Address Transfer
data.description: According to Foresight News, Scam Sniffer has reported that a user has lost approximately $304,000 in assets due to transferring funds to an incorrect address. The incident highlights the risks associated with digital transactions and the importance of verifying addresses before completing transfers.

data.title: Amos and Lumma crypto malware is being distributed via Reddit posts
data.description:
Lumma and AMOS crypto-stealing malware has recently been distributed via Reddit posts. These posts target Windows and Mac users in the crypto space.  Such posts use various tactics to trick the user into downloading infected software. However, one lure is becoming particularly common – a cracked version of TradingView.  These scammers have recently been lurking […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/amos-and-lumma-crypto-malware-reddit/

data.title: Federal Reserve Projects Moderate Rate Cuts by 2025
data.description:
Fed predicts rate cuts in 2025 amid cautious economic outlook, impacting financial markets globally.
source: https://coincu.com/327503-fed-2025-rate-cuts-projection

data.title: Trump Media execs launch SPAC to raise $179M; eyeing US-based crypto, data security firms
data.description:
The SPAC seeks to raise $179 million to fund its acquisition of a company in the crypto, blockchain or dual-use technology sectors.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347207/trump-media-execs-launch-spac-to-raise-179m-eyeing-us-based-crypto-data-security-firms?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
